description: This file contains data transfer object (DTO) definitions for User-related requests and responses, including record classes for UserResponse, CreateUserRequest, and UpdateUserRequest within a backend API project.

classes.name: UserResponse
classes.description: A record class representing a user data response, created from a User object.

classes.name: CreateUserRequest
classes.description: A record class for creating new users, with validation annotations.

classes.name: UpdateUserRequest
classes.description: A record class for updating existing users, with validation annotations.

methods.name: from
methods.description: Static method to create a UserResponse instance from a User object.
